children.label: B
children.text: any other Executive agency or the Smithsonian Institution, to the extent of any election in effect under ;section 3652(b) of this title
“position” means a civilian position in the Commission, or in any other agency if a substantial portion of the duties and responsibilities are performed in the Republic of Panama; and
“employee” means an individual serving in a position.
